name: Alex Carter
goals: Improve reading speed and comprehension for workplace emails
Gain confidence using polite but natural requests in everyday situations
Expand practical vocabulary for remote collaboration and scheduling
weak_areas: nuanced grammar contrasts at N3 (e.g., ~ように vs ~ために)
kanji recall for mid-frequency everyday words
speaking fluency when making suggestions or requests
last_session_summary: Covered travel-related phrases and a basic workplace dialogue. Practiced past tense review and simple requests.
